description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a variety of trees, including both leafy green and blossoming pink varieties. The house features a gray gable roof and a light-colored facade, with a prominent front entryway that includes a small porch and steps. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with a mix of single and double panes. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass windows and a shingled roof. The surrounding landscape is open, with the house set back from the trees, suggesting a residential neighborhood setting.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, light facade, symmetrical windows, and a small front porch, surrounded by green and pink trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, steps, and symmetrical windows flanking the door.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side windows and the extension of the gable roof, with trees more densely clustered on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back wall with fewer windows and a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the roofline, with a mix of tree types nearby.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
